<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after UP
t = last_transition
before_nodes = t.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
after_nodes = t.after_frame.segmentation['nodes']
before_ids = set(n['id'] for n in before_nodes)
after_ids = set(n['id'] for n in after_nodes)
new_ids = after_ids - before_ids
removed_ids = before_ids - after_ids
print("New IDs
print("New:", new_ids)
print("Removed:", removed_ids)
# Check if any node's pixels changed
before_by_id = {n['id']: n for n in before_nodes}
after_by_id = {n['id']: n for n in after_nodes}
for nid in before_ids & after_ids:
    b = before_by_id[nid]
    a = after_by_id[nid]
    if b['pixels'] != a['pixels']:
        print("Pixel count changed for node", nid:", b['pixels'], "->", a['pixels'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check ASCII diff for UP action
before_lines = last_transition.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')
after_lines = last_transition.after_frame.ascii.split('\n')
diff_rows = []
for i in range(len(before_lines)):
    if i != len(after_lines) and before_lines[i] != after_lines[i]:
        diff_rows.append(i)
print("Diff rows:", diff_rows)
for r in diff_rows[:5]:
    print("Row", r, r)
    print("  B:", before_lines[r])
    print("  A:", after_lines[r])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
